name: Brasil Brokers Participacoes S.A.
summary: Brasil Brokers Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S.A., through its subsidiaries, operates as a real estate brokerage and consulting company in Brazil. The company engages in the sale of buildings, residential units, lots, residential condominiums, shopping malls, commercial units, flats, and hotels, as well as sale of finished properties. It also provides advisory services for the trade of real estate financial services; and real estate loans, as well as engages in the leasing of real estate properties. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
